main-deck.note: Pre-collapse frozen Ridley (standing); the vgmaps rip is endgame state (collapsed). Source: 'Main Deck46.png' from github.com/randovania/randovania, committed unmodified - the render has a 32px border of off-camera tiles around the 480x160 two-screen room. The room's right screen (8,10) deliberately stays on the vgmaps rip: the render draws its hatch in the wrong door color.
